CI States
Latest PR Test (Base): ❌ Missing run-ci label -- add it to run CI tests.
Latest PR Test (Extra): ❌ Blocked -- run-ci is required first.

sglang.title: [Feat] Add llava qwen, llava mistral
sglang.author: kcz358
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR add the following models:

llava_qwen
llava_mistral

Allowing people to use sglang to serve LLaVA-NeXT-Qwen 72B and 110B
Tokenizer:

llava_llama3
llava_qwen
llava_mistral


About : LLaVA-NeXT (stronger)

GitHub repo : https://github.com/LLaVA-VL/LLaVA-NeXT/tree/inference
Blog : https://llava

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Move `test_utils.py` to `tests/utils.py`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Since #4335 was merged, I've noticed that the definition of ServerRunner in the tests is the same as in the test for OpenAI API. I have moved the class to the test utilities to avoid code duplication. (Although it only has been repeated twice so far, I will add another similar test suite in #4200 wh

vllm.title: [Scheduler] Warning upon preemption and Swapping
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR

Expose # of cumulative preemption from stats logger and metrics
Update performance.rst to talk about preemption and mitigation
Print warning when preemption first happens (and every 500 times)
Add test for preemption warning. I also found the vLLM logger has a bug that it cannot be captured

vllm.title: [Misc] Enhance attention selector
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is to provide more information (such as block size and kv cache dtype) to attention backend selector so that it can be used to find the appropriate attention backend. Also, the PR moves kv_cache_dtype from AttentionMetadata to Attention.
This PR is a prerequisite for #3648

vllm.title: [Frontend] [Core] perf: Automatically detect vLLM-tensorized model, update `tensorizer` to version 2.9.0
vllm.author: sangstar
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Automatically detect vLLM-tensorized model, update tensorizer to version 2.9.0
This PR accomplishes several things:

Updates docstrings to account for tensorizer refactor in #4097 in the tensorize_vllm_examples.py example script, and slight corrections to the docstrings of the new, refactored functi

vllm.title: [Speculative decoding] Improve n-gram efficiency
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR refactors the ngram (PLD) implementation to make it more efficient. Specifically, in ngram worker

Do not use .all() when n-gram size is 1.
Keep all tensors on GPU all the time and avoid using Python native lists.
When a sequence has no match, return None instead of padding 0's.
When the spe

vllm.title: [Kernel] Use flash-attn for decoding
vllm.author: skrider
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Vendors flash-attention from Dao-AILab/flash-attention#824, prunes out the backward pass operator for faster compile times, adds reshape and cache kernel for flash attention kv cache layout, adds logic for selecting kv cache manager / attention backend based on temporary environment variable VLLM_TE

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix dynamic FP8 quantization for Mixtral
vllm.author: pcmoritz
vllm.bodyExcerpt: If the checkpoint is not an FP8 checkpoint, we first load the weights as FP16 and then quantize them after they are loaded. A small bug was introduced in https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/4527/files#diff-74473eb619768ed055303d29d74c47b1753615e8323e69467506b2b42d3f9898R98 which would make it

vllm.title: [Doc] Shorten README by removing supported model list
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Our supported model list in README is getting too long and has started to be distracting. This PR shortens the list and guide the users to our doc.
